name: 小坂さん。 - Remaster
short_description: “A meteorite will fall in three days. That's why I want to commit suicide proactively before then.” The girl who told me this upon our first meeting was someone I encountered on the school rooftop—a place that should have been off-limits.
detailed_description:
Title: Mr. Kosaka. - Remaster

Content: Visual Novel Game

・About the Translation Patch

A volunteer has kindly created an English translation patch.

Please refer to the Community Hub.

※This is because we cannot include external links on the store page.

※We do not provide support for the translation patch here.

・Synopsis

“An asteroid will hit in three days.”

“So I want to commit suicide in a positive way before then.”

These were the words spoken to me by a girl I met on the roof of our school—a place that should have been off-limits—on our first encounter.

This is the record of the three days following my meeting with “Ms. Kosaka,” who had decided to take her own life.

・Game Overview

The scenario is a linear path with no branching, taking about 1-2 hours to complete. There are no character voices. The game progresses entirely with still illustrations, not character sprites. (See product images)

・Regarding Gameplay Videos

Feel free to create them.

However, please be mindful as the content includes depictions of antisocial acts such as suicide.

Translated with (free version)
